test_cases:
[
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_INITIATED_DETACH_001",
    "title": "Positive Test: UE-initiated Detach Request with Switch Off from E-UTRAN",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is camped on an E-UTRAN cell",
      "UE is in ECM-IDLE mode",
      "UE has a valid GUTI",
      "UE has an active PDN connection"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Trigger the UE to send NAS Detach Request message with parameters GUTI and Switch Off=true to the MME.",
      "Verify the eNodeB forwards the NAS Detach Request message to MME including TAI and ECGI of the cell used by the UE.",
      "Verify if Dual Connectivity is active, PSCell ID is included in the Uplink NAS Transport.",
      "Verify MME processes the Detach Request, triggers S1 connection establishment if UE was in ECM-IDLE.",
      "If UE has activated PDN connections, verify MME sends Delete Session Request including LBI, User Location Information (ECGI), Secondary RAT usage data, and PSCell ID to Serving GW per PDN connection.",
      "Verify Serving GW processes Delete Session Request and responds with Delete Session Response.",
      "Verify MME sends Detach Accept to UE if Switch Off indicates detach is not due to switch off.",
      "Verify MME sends S1 Release Command to eNodeB with Cause=Detach and includes PSCell ID if Dual Connectivity was active.",
      "Verify eNodeB releases S1 connection and sends S1 UE Context Release Complete to MME."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "UE sends NAS Detach Request with correct parameters.",
      "eNodeB forwards NAS Detach Request with cell info to MME correctly.",
      "MME processes Detach Request and initiates session deletion correctly.",
      "Serving GW deactivates EPS bearers and responds properly.",
      "MME sends Detach Accept message if applicable.",
      "S1 Release procedure completes successfully with proper cause and PSCell ID inclusion.",
      "UE moves to detached state correctly."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Monitor NAS message logs between UE, eNodeB, and MME.",
      "Trace S1-AP signaling messages between eNodeB and MME.",
      "Capture Delete Session Request and Response messages between MME, Serving GW, and PDN GW.",
      "Check MME logs for detach procedure steps.",
      "Verify UE state transition via signaling trace."
    ],
    "category": ["POSITIVE TESTING", "INTEGRATION TESTING"]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_INITIATED_DETACH_002",
    "title": "Negative Test: UE Detach Request via CSG Cell Without Subscription",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is camped on a CSG cell",
      "UE sends NAS Detach Request with Switch Off=false",
      "CSG subscription for the CSG ID and associated PLMN is absent or expired"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Trigger UE to send NAS Detach Request with Switch Off=false to MME via CSG cell.",
      "Verify MME detects missing or expired CSG subscription.",
      "Verify MME triggers MME-initiated Detach procedure as per clause 5.3.8.3.",
      "Verify MME sends Detach Request message to UE with cause indicating UE is not allowed to access this CSG.",
      "Verify UE removes this CSG ID and associated PLMN from Allowed CSG list if present."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME detects invalid CSG subscription and triggers MME-initiated detach.",
      "UE receives Detach Request with appropriate cause.",
      "UE removes unauthorized CSG ID and PLMN from Allowed CSG list."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Trace NAS signaling messages between UE and MME.",
      "Check MME logs for CSG subscription validation.",
      "Inspect UE internal CSG Allowed list before and after detach.",
      "Validate MME-initiated Detach messages."
    ],
    "category": ["NEGATIVE TESTING", "SECURITY TESTING", "INTEGRATION TESTING"]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_UE_INITIATED_DETACH_003",
    "title": "Edge Case Test: UE Detach Request with No Activated PDN Connections",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is camped on E-UTRAN",
      "UE sends NAS Detach Request with Switch Off parameter",
      "UE has no activated PDN connection"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Trigger UE to send NAS Detach Request to MME.",
      "Verify MME detects no activated PDN connection for UE.",
      "Verify steps 2 to 10 of the detach procedure are skipped.",
      "If PLMN configured secondary RAT usage data reporting, verify MME waits for step 11 if applicable, performs step 12 before skipping steps 2-10.",
      "Verify MME releases S1-MME signalling connection by sending S1 Release Command to eNodeB."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME correctly skips PDN related detach steps when no activated PDN connection.",
      "S1 Release procedure is executed properly.",
      "No Delete Session Requests are sent by MME to Serving GW or PDN GW.",
      "Secondary RAT usage data reporting handled correctly if configured."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Monitor MME signaling and log for detach procedure steps executed.",
      "Check S1 Release messages from MME to eNodeB.",
      "Verify no session deletion messages sent from MME to Serving GW/PDN GW.",
      "Inspect secondary RAT usage reporting if applicable."
    ],
    "category": ["EDGE CASES", "POSITIVE TESTING", "INTEGRATION TESTING"]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_MME_INITIATED_DETACH_001",
    "title": "Positive Test: MME Initiated Explicit Detach with Re-Attach Requested",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is registered and has one or more PDN connections",
      "UE is in ECM-CONNECTED state"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Trigger MME to explicitly initiate Detach procedure by sending Detach Request message to UE with Detach Type set to re-attach.",
      "Verify UE receives Detach Request and sends Detach Accept to MME.",
      "Verify MME sends Delete Session Request per PDN connection to Serving GW including LBI, User Location Information, NAS Release Cause, Secondary RAT usage data, PSCell ID.",
      "Verify Serving GW processes Delete Session Request and responds with Delete Session Response.",
      "Verify MME sends Detach Notification to SGSN if ISR activated.",
      "Verify SGSN sends Delete Session Request messages to Serving GW if complete detach.",
      "Verify PDN GW receives Delete Session Request and responds appropriately.",
      "Verify PDN GW initiates IP-CAN Session Termination with PCRF if configured.",
      "Verify MME sends S1 Release Command to eNodeB after receiving Detach Accept and Delete Session Responses.",
      "Verify UE detaches and re-attaches after RRC Connection Release."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME successfully detaches UE and requests re-attach.",
      "UE correctly processes Detach Request and responds.",
      "Sessions and bearers are deleted properly in Serving GW and PDN GW.",
      "PCRF receives session termination if applicable.",
      "S1 Release procedure completes correctly.",
      "UE performs re-attach after detach."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Trace NAS signaling messages between MME and UE.",
      "Monitor Delete Session Request/Response messages on S5/S8 interfaces.",
      "Verify PCRF interactions from PDN GW logs.",
      "Check S1 Release signaling between MME and eNodeB.",
      "Validate UE state transitions via signaling traces."
    ],
    "category": ["POSITIVE TESTING", "INTEGRATION TESTING"]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_MME_INITIATED_DETACH_002",
    "title": "Negative Test: MME Initiated Implicit Detach Without Detach Request to UE",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE has not communicated with MME for a long period",
      "UE is in ECM-IDLE state"
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "Trigger MME to initiate implicit detach (no Detach Request message sent to UE).",
      "Verify MME locally deletes UE context without notifying UE.",
      "Verify no Detach Request or Detach Accept NAS messages are sent between MME and UE.",
      "Verify that SGSN registration is not detached.",
      "Verify MME sends Delete Session Requests to Serving GW and subsequent steps as per explicit detach except no paging or UE interaction."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "MME detaches UE locally without UE signaling involvement.",
      "No Detach Request/Accept messages exchanged with UE.",
      "SGSN registration remains intact.",
      "Session deletion and bearer deactivation proceed correctly.",
      "MME releases S1 connection if applicable."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Monitor MME logs for detach initiation and UE signaling.",
      "
